data.title: Fresh Faces, New Perspectives: Diversity Among New REALTORS® in 2024
data.description: The 2024 NAR Member Profile revealed a significant trend: new REALTORS® entering the industry are notably more diverse compared to experienced professionals. This emphasizes a shift towards greater inclusivity among new NAR members.

data.title: Instant Reaction: CPI, August 14, 2024
data.description: According to recent data released on August 14, 2024, the Consumer Price Index (CPI) showed a decrease, indicating a more stable inflation rate. This development suggests that the Federal Reserve may be inclined to initiate a series of interest rate cuts starting in September. Lawrence Yun commented on these findings, highlighting the potential for a monetary policy adjustment by the Fed in the near future.

data.title: Anaptys Provides Update on Business Separation and Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On March 3, 2026, in San Diego, AnaptysBio, Inc. (Nasdaq: ANAB), a biotech firm in clinical stages aiming to provide groundbreaking immunology treatments, disclosed progress regarding a possible separation of its biopharma activities. Additionally, the company presented financial outcomes for the quarter and year concluded on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Loci Capital Completes Exit Through Strategic Recapitalization of Prose Stevens Pointe Multifamily Investment
data.description: Loci Capital has successfully completed the recapitalization exit of Prose Stevens Pointe, which is a 264-unit workforce apartment complex situated in St. Cloud, FL, located in close proximity to Orlando.

data.title: BioNexus Gene Lab Corp. Completes Chemrex Governance Restructuring; Appoints Matthew Barsing as Chairman
data.description: Improved board supervision is ensuring that the subsidiary is better aligned with a rigorous approach to allocating capital and evaluating strategic decisions. The subsidiary's performance is now subject to more thorough examination and oversight by the board, resulting in enhanced decision-making processes. This shift is crucial given its financial significance, with the subsidiary accounting for a substantial portion of the company's overall revenue. The subsidiary's financial health and strategic direction will be closely monitored to optimize its performance and ensure long-term success.

data.title: Southwest Strategies Group Rebrands as Bodewell Group Following Sustained Growth and Strategic Acquisitions
data.description: A unified strategic communications firm has been created by consolidating numerous agencies. The firm is specifically dedicated to advancing client interests in the crucial infrastructure sectors of the nation. This new brand aims to streamline services and provide specialized support to clients within these critical industries.

data.title: Employers Holdings, Inc. posts Q4 2025 & full-year results, declares $0.32/share dividend, and completes $125M recapitalization.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that new records have been achieved in the stock market. The S&P 500 index reached an all-time high of 4,500 points, showing a 2% increase. The Dow Jones Industrial Average also hit a milestone by surpassing 35,000 points, marking a significant 1.5% gain. These new highs come as investors show optimism about the economic recovery and corporate earnings. The technology sector notably performed well, with the Nasdaq Composite climbing 2.5% to reach 15,000 points. This positive momentum is attributed to various factors such as strong quarterly results and expectations of increased consumer spending. Experts predict that the market will continue to be influenced by factors like inflation data and progress in combating the ongoing pandemic.

data.title: MNA: RNs at Five UMass Memorial Hospitals to Hold Informational Pickets Across Central Mass. on Thursday, March 26
data.description: Nurses represented by the Massachusetts Nurses Association (MNA) are advocating for equitable agreements focusing on patient and workplace safety, adequate staffing, and competitive pay in Worcester, Mass. As of March 24, 2026, registered nurses at five UMass Memorial hospital locations are engaging in negotiations.

data.title: Forgent Power Solutions Announces Public Offering of Class A Common Stock
data.description: Forgent Power Solutions, Inc. revealed a public offering of its Class A common stock. The offering involves 20,688,335 shares of Class A common stock, which are being offered by parent entities of the Company controlled by Neos Partners, LP. Forgent is known for designing and manufacturing electrical distribution equipment used in various sectors including data centers, the power grid, and energy-intensive industrial facilities. The company is listed on the NYSE under the symbol FPS.

data.title: Willamette Valley Vineyards Posts Results for 2025
data.description: In Salem, Oregon, on March 24, 2026, Willamette Valley Vineyards, Inc. (NASDAQ: WVVI), a prominent producer of Pinot Noir in Oregon, reported a loss per common share after preferred dividends of $0.64 for the year ending December 31, 2025, and $0.48 for the year ending December 31, 2024.

data.title: INTEGRA REPORTS FOURTH QUARTER 2025 RESULTS; STRONG ANNUAL PRODUCTION FROM FLORIDA CANYON MINE, RECORD ADJUSTED NET EARNINGS, AND STRENGTHENED FINANCIAL POSITION
data.description: Integra Resources Corp., trading under the tickers TSXV: ITR and NYSE American: ITRG, has disclosed its financial and operational performance for the three months and full year concluding in December. The company, based in Vancouver, BC, shared this information via a press release on March 24, 2026. For more details, visit www.integraresources.com.

data.title: Notation Labs Secures Two U.S. Patents Powering the Next Generation of LeakSecure® Smart Water Protection
data.description: LeakSecure, an advanced smart home water protection system developed by Notation Labs Inc., based in Scottsdale, Arizona, has recently obtained new patents that significantly improve its capability to identify water problems and safeguard residences. The patents also enable LeakSecure to provide instantaneous information to homeowners, supporting them in promptly addressing any issues. The enhancements underline the company's commitment to enhancing the effectiveness of LeakSecure, with these developments being unveiled on March 24, 2026.

data.title: Brayton Purcell LLP Releases New Podcast Episode Detailing Critical Testimony at February 19 Cal/OSHA Meeting on Artificial Stone Ban
data.description: In Novato, California, on March 24, 2026, Brayton Purcell LLP launched Episode 12 of their podcast "From Dust to Verdict," focusing on the February 19, 2026 Cal/OSHA Standards Board meeting. This meeting could potentially lead to California banning certain activities.

data.title: Harrow Announces Pricing of $50.0 Million Offering of Senior Unsecured Notes Due 2030
data.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn., March 24, 2026 - Harrow, a leading provider of ophthalmic disease management solutions in North America, revealed the pricing of its private offering for $50.0 million aggregate principal amount of 8.625% senior unsecured notes due 2030, known as the “2030 Notes”. These notes will be supported by the Company’s current and future wholly-owned domestic restricted subsidiaries, along with certain exceptions. The Offering is set to conclude on March 27, 2026, pending standard closing conditions.
